template_name: Oval Sculptural Pedestal Coffee Table with Recessed Bowl

drafting_rules.top: Draw oval stone slab with concentric circular recessed bowl near center. Use centerlines and section marker A-A.
drafting_rules.front: Draw thin oval slab as flat line/thick profile. Under it draw tapered truncated cone brass pedestal centered below slab.
drafting_rules.side: Same structure as front but shorter apparent width due to oval depth.
drafting_rules.section: Show stone slab thickness, circular recessed brass bowl, hidden steel mounting plate, hollow tapered metal pedestal.
